Updates

Summer School
Posted: Feb 16, 2024

In the tradition of previous Data Science Africa events, a summer school on machine learning and data science will be held prior to the main workshop. This summer school will target graduate students, researchers, and professionals working with huge amounts of data or unique datasets. The DSA 2024 Nyeri Summer School will be hosted by the Dedan... continue reading

Workshop
Posted: Jan 31, 2024

Extended Abstracts Karibu! We invite you to submit an extended abstract for the Data Science Africa (DSA) 2024 workshop that will be held in Nyeri, Kenya from June 6th to June 7th. The abstracts should focus on African challenges or methods that are relevant to addressing problems in Africa. At least one African researcher should be a co-au... continue reading
